title: Argon Tableware 16 Piece Copper Stainless Steel Cutlery Set – Modern Metallic Dining Set for 4 People with Knives, Forks, Spoons & Teaspoons – Elegant Dishwasher Safe Tableware
features: 🍽️ Elegant 16-Piece Copper Cutlery Set – Bring warmth and sophistication to your dining table with this Argon Tableware Cutlery Set. Perfect for both everyday meals and special occasions, it adds a luxurious touch to any setting.

🥄 High-Quality Stainless Steel Construction – Expertly crafted from durable stainless steel, this cutlery set combines strength, balance, and lightness for long-lasting performance and everyday comfort.

✨ Luxurious Copper Finish – The rich metallic copper coating adds a glamorous yet refined edge to your table décor, beautifully complementing both contemporary and traditional interiors for an elevated dining experience.

🍴 Complete Set for Four – Includes 4 Dinner Knives, 4 Dinner Forks, 4 Dessert Spoons, and 4 Teaspoons — everything you need to serve meals in coordinated, modern style. Ideal for families or entertaining guests.

📏 Dimensions – Dinner Knife: 21cm x 2cm | Dinner Fork: 19.5cm x 2cm | Dessert Spoon: 20cm x 4.3cm | Teaspoon: 14.5cm x 3cm. Perfectly balanced for comfort, functionality, and aesthetic appeal at every meal.
description: Product Description Serve modern elegance and luxury to any table setting with the Argon Tableware Coloured Cutlery collection, available in a choice of classic metallic colourways that lends an understated shine to both classic and contemporary interiors alike.
